name: SpendCategory
description: Hierarchical user-maintained Spend Category identity with append-only parent and lifecycle history retained for direct assignment and deterministic roll-ups.
schema_def: spend_category: id ULID primary key; createdAt trusted UTC instant. category_lifecycle_event: id, categoryId, action create|rename|archive|reactivate, label, normalizedSiblingName, reason, actor, trusted time, previousEventId. category_parent_event: id, categoryId, parentCategoryId nullable for root, action initialize|reparent, reason, actor, trusted time, previousEventId. current_category_projection: categoryId, name, parentCategoryId, depth, ancestryIds ordered root-to-self, status. Constraints: zero or one active parent; no self-parent or cycle; active parent and active ancestry required for create, reparent, and reactivate; normalized name unique among active siblings; any active node is assignable; parent with active children cannot archive; historical references RESTRICT. Direct totals include assignments to the node; subtree totals include direct plus descendants exactly once.
